title: Outcome
description: The actual bid outcome recorded against a recommendation, used for accuracy measurement and learning

outcome_id.description: Unique identifier for this outcome record

recommendation_id.description: The recommendation this outcome corresponds to

tender_id.description: The tender that was bid on (or not)

company_id.description: The company that bid (or did not bid)

human_decision.description: What the bid team actually decided (may differ from system recommendation)

bid_submitted.description: Whether a bid was actually submitted

bid_won.description: Whether the submitted bid was won. Null if bid was submitted but result not yet known.

contract_value_inr.description: Actual contract value in INR if won

disqualified_at_evaluation.description: True if the bid was rejected during pre-qualification evaluation (validation check)

loss_reason.description: If bid was lost, the stated or inferred reason

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when this outcome was recorded (ISO 8601)
